case_title: ERICKSON, OWEN et al VS HARRIS, NETTIE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY ERICKSON, OWEN ERICKSON, MARTINE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, NETTIE UNION STREET TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
